sql_query.query: WITH caller AS (SELECT u.id, u.organization_id, u.role FROM users u JOIN organizations o ON o.id = u.organization_id AND o.active = TRUE WHERE u.id = $1 AND u.organization_id = $2 AND u.role = $3 AND u.active = TRUE), selected_cohort AS (SELECT c.* FROM cohorts c JOIN caller ca ON ca.organization_id = c.organization_id WHERE c.active = TRUE ORDER BY c.start_date DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT 1), visible_submissions AS (SELECT s.* FROM submissions s JOIN milestones m ON m.id = s.milestone_id AND m.organization_id = s.organization_id JOIN selected_cohort c ON c.id = m.cohort_id AND c.organization_id = s.organization_id CROSS JOIN caller ca WHERE s.organization_id = ca.organization_id AND (ca.role <> 'learner' OR s.learner_id = ca.id)) SELECT (SELECT json_build_object('id', c.id, 'organizationId', c.organization_id, 'name', c.name, 'programName', c.program_name, 'location', c.location, 'startDate', c.start_date::text, 'endDate', c.end_date::text, 'currency', c.currency, 'budget', c.budget, 'committed', c.committed, 'disbursed', c.disbursed, 'learnerCount', c.learner_count) FROM selected_cohort c) AS cohort, json_build_object('activeLearners', COALESCE((SELECT learner_count FROM selected_cohort), 0), 'awaitingReview', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visible_submissions WHERE status = 'submitted'), 'awaitingFinance', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visible_submissions WHERE status = 'awaiting_finance'), 'paidThisMonth', COALESCE((SELECT SUM(p.amount) FROM payouts p JOIN visible_submissions s ON s.id = p.submission_id AND s.organization_id = p.organization_id WHERE p.status = 'paid' AND p.paid_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)), 0), 'atRisk', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visible_submissions s JOIN milestones m ON m.id = s.milestone_id AND m.organization_id = s.organization_id LEFT JOIN workflow_steps ws ON ws.id = s.current_step_id AND ws.organization_id = s.organization_id WHERE s.status NOT IN ('paid', 'failed') AND (m.due_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP OR (ws.sla_hours IS NOT NULL AND s.updated_at + (ws.sla_hours::text || ' hours')::interval < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP))), 'averageReviewHours', COALESCE((SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (approved.created_at - submitted.created_at)) / 3600.0)::numeric, 1) FROM audit_events submitted JOIN visible_submissions s ON s.id = submitted.submission_id AND s.organization_id = submitted.organization_id JOIN LATERAL (SELECT a.created_at FROM audit_events a WHERE a.organization_id = submitted.organization_id AND a.submission_id = submitted.submission_id AND a.event_type = 'mentor_approved' AND a.created_at >= submitted.created_at ORDER BY a.created_at LIMIT 1) approved ON TRUE WHERE submitted.event_type = 'evidence_submitted'), 0), 'completionRate', COALESCE((SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'paid') / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) FROM visible_submissions), 0)) AS summary, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('day', d.day_label, 'submitted', d.submitted, 'approved', d.approved, 'paid', d.paid) ORDER BY d.activity_date), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT gs::date AS activity_date, to_char(gs, 'Dy') AS day_label, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visible_submissions s WHERE s.submitted_at::date = gs::date) AS submitted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_events a JOIN visible_submissions s ON s.id = a.submission_id AND s.organization_id = a.organization_id WHERE a.event_type = 'mentor_approved' AND a.created_at::date = gs::date) AS approved, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payouts p JOIN visible_submissions s ON s.id = p.submission_id AND s.organization_id = p.organization_id WHERE p.status = 'paid' AND p.paid_at::date = gs::date) AS paid FROM generate_series(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days', CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1 day') gs) d) AS activity, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('id', s.id, 'milestoneId', s.milestone_id, 'learnerId', s.learner_id, 'learnerName', u.name, 'milestoneTitle', m.title, 'cohortName', c.name, 'evidenceUrl', s.evidence_url, 'evidenceFileName', s.evidence_file_name, 'evidenceNote', s.evidence_note, 'status', s.status, 'currentStepId', s.current_step_id, 'submittedAt', s.submitted_at::text, 'updatedAt', s.updated_at::text, 'dueAt', m.due_at::text, 'reviewerFeedback', s.reviewer_feedback, 'amount', m.amount, 'payoutStatus', COALESCE(p.status, 'not_started')) ORDER BY s.updated_at DESC, s.id DESC), '[]'::json) FROM visible_submissions s JOIN users u ON u.id = s.learner_id AND u.organization_id = s.organization_id JOIN milestones m ON m.id = s.milestone_id AND m.organization_id = s.organization_id JOIN cohorts c ON c.id = m.cohort_id AND c.organization_id = s.organization_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT p1.status FROM payouts p1 WHERE p1.organization_id = s.organization_id AND p1.submission_id = s.id ORDER BY p1.created_at DESC, p1.id DESC LIMIT 1) p ON TRUE) AS submissions, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('id', p.id, 'submissionId', p.submission_id, 'learnerId', p.learner_id, 'learnerName', u.name, 'milestoneTitle', m.title, 'amount', p.amount, 'currency', p.currency, 'provider', p.provider, 'providerReference', p.provider_reference, 'status', p.status, 'approvedAt', p.approved_at::text, 'paidAt', p.paid_at::text) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC), '[]'::json) FROM payouts p JOIN visible_submissions s ON s.id = p.submission_id AND s.organization_id = p.organization_id JOIN users u ON u.id = p.learner_id AND u.organization_id = p.organization_id JOIN milestones m ON m.id = s.milestone_id AND m.organization_id = s.organization_id) AS payouts, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('id', a.id, 'submissionId', a.submission_id, 'actorId', a.actor_id, 'actorName', a.actor_name, 'actorRole', a.actor_role, 'eventType', a.event_type, 'title', a.title, 'detail', a.detail, 'createdAt', a.created_at::text, 'metadata', COALESCE(a.metadata, '{}'::jsonb)) ORDER BY a.created_at DESC, a.id DESC), '[]'::json) FROM audit_events a JOIN visible_submissions s ON s.id = a.submission_id AND s.organization_id = a.organization_id) AS events FROM caller
